notes: 28/29 names taken verbatim from terms.md §武器名 (validator-normalized ·→・). The one exception: 0x327 'クロ−' ends in U+2212 (minus sign, a ROM typo for the long-vowel bar ー), so it has no exact terms.md key; terms.md's クロー entry is dual-valued (有线爪 / 利爪). Positional evidence pins 0x327 to ヴァル・ヴァロ (Val Walo): the library list follows unit first-appearance order and 0x327 sits in the run スキュラ(0x322, イージス)→クロ−→ミサイル・ポッド(0x32C)→プラズマ・リーダー(0x332), the latter two being Val Walo weapons; phase 1 (data/zh/units.json ptr 0x232944A) translated Val Walo's クロー as 有线爪, so used 有线爪 here. The 利爪 branch (バウンドドッグ/ビグロ/レイダーガンダム, ptr 0x218994E) corresponds to the second library クロー at 0x755 (a different batch). Val Walo's flexible wire-guided claw arms confirmed via Gundam wikis (see web_sources).
